appliedUpdates.description: Created initial user-testing.md with testing guidance, concurrency limits (max 3 concurrent for shell surface), environment notes (uv path, Python versions), and flow validator guidance for shell-based tests.

notes.scopeNote: This run tested only the 10 assertions from implementation feature fulfills fields (VAL-BUILD-001 through VAL-BUILD-008, VAL-COMPAT-001, VAL-COMPAT-002). The UV compatibility (VAL-UV-*), test suite (VAL-TEST-*), and cross-area flow (VAL-CROSS-*) assertions were not part of any feature's fulfills field and remain pending for future testing.
notes.friction: Running uv with --python 3.13 and 3.14 recreates the .venv directory each time (switching interpreters). Test-only side effect; .venv is transient and not tracked by git.
